channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Staten Island shipyard explosion, fire leaves 1 dead, over 30 hurt
item.description: One person died and over 30 people, mostly FDNY members, were hurt in an explosion and fire at a Staten Island shipyard Friday.

item.title: WATCH: America Strong: Colorado firefighters rescue family's dog trapped under deck
item.description: Firefighters in Centennial, Colorado, rushed to help rescue a family's beloved Yorkshire terrier, Tank, that was trapped under a deck.

item.title: Trump says U.S. will only sign Iran agreement "if we get everything we want"
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio said "there might be some news a little later today" when asked about the Iran negotiations.

item.title: Dems' 2024 audit prompts mixed feelings towards DNC chair's leadership
item.description: Martin has faced criticism over the report, which was released this week.
